meta.title: Legal Guard — AI legal assistant for businesses
meta.description: Contract review & Vietnamese law lookup — cites in-force articles, never fabricates.

dashboard.lede: An overview of your company's review activity — contracts processed, risk distribution, feedback signals, and tactics by win rate.
dashboard.error: Couldn't load metrics. Try again later.
dashboard.empty: No contracts reviewed yet. Try the Review page.

app.lede: Paste or upload a contract + declare your negotiating position → the AI flags risky clauses, separates illegal from merely unfavorable, and proposes tactics for your position.
app.error: Analysis failed or timed out. Try again later.
app.leadIntro: The following are the risks and proposed amendments
app.illegalPost: ; the infringing portion may be declared void.
app.amendBtn: Agree to amend → draft new clause
app.agreeDone: Recorded — you agreed to apply the proposed clause.
app.checkpointDesc: High risk — a lawyer should review before use.
app.approved: Approved — the message to the counterparty is unlocked below.
app.rejectedSent: Case sent to a lawyer via the expert channel.
app.counterDraft: Preliminary draft (offline) — a lawyer should finalize it.
app.disclaimer: A support tool — not a substitute for formal legal advice. Always check the original text.

nego.title: Multi-round negotiation
nego.lede: Paste the counterparty's reply → the AI assesses, updates strategy, and drafts a bilingual response. Context carries across rounds.

memo.title: Amendment memo
memo.lede: Compile risky clauses + suggestions into a memo for lawyer review; download as Word to send.
memo.docxUnavailable: Word export not enabled on the server — use the markdown below.

lookup.lede: Ask a legal question — answers cite the exact Article/Clause of in-force documents, with sources. No fabrication, no dead law.
lookup.placeholder: e.g. What is the maximum penalty for breaching a commercial contract?
lookup.confLow: Confidence: Low — verify with a lawyer
lookup.error: Couldn't get an answer from the server. Try again later.
lookup.ex1: What is the maximum penalty for breaching a commercial contract?
lookup.ex2: What is the loan interest rate cap under the Civil Code?
lookup.ex3: When must an invoice be issued for the sale of goods?
lookup.disclaimer: A support tool — not a substitute for formal legal advice. Always check the original text.

home.h1: An outsourced legal department, run by AI.
home.lede: Legal Guard reviews international contracts for Vietnamese SMEs — flagging unfavorable and illegal clauses, and proposing how to renegotiate from your real position. Every answer is grounded in in-force law, never fabricated.
home.f1d: Detects risky clauses, separates illegal from merely unfavorable, suggests tactics for your position.
home.f2d: Answers cite the exact Article/Clause of in-force documents — no fabrication, no dead law.
home.f3d: Paste the counterparty's reply → a new negotiation round, context-aware, with bilingual counter-clauses.
home.foot: 12 legal domains · 54/54 internal golden · grounded in in-force law · a support tool, not a substitute for legal advice.

trust.lede: How we keep the AI from fabricating law — with metrics on our internal test set.
trust.error: Couldn't load metrics from the server. Try again later.

tools.heading: Advanced legal tools
tools.monitorLede: Pick a date → the agent finds newly issued documents and which of your contracts they affect.
tools.inForceLede: Enter a document ID → whether it is still in force, the current version if replaced, and amendment notes.
tools.impactTitle: Which contracts does a new law affect?
tools.impactLede: Enter a newly issued document ID → which of your contracts cite the documents it amends/replaces/guides.
tools.redlineLede: Paste the old and new versions → marks additions/removals + similarity.

footer.tagline: A legal support tool — not a substitute for formal advice.
